'Materials and Supplies' is the clearest COGS-like expense label available, but total direct cost may also involve 'Change in inventories of finished goods and in work in progress' and possibly 'External Services', so manual review is warranted. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Materials and Supplies

candidates.why: Could be operating expense in some industries, but here it likely reflects direct service/project costs and is better excluded from SG&A.
Clear overhead/personnel cost component appropriate for SG&A.
Explicit SG&A stock-based compensation label, but likely part of broader personnel/operating expenses and preview is empty.
Clear overhead bucket appropriate for SG&A.
Looks like a subcomponent of personnel expenses, so less preferred than the broader personnel row.
Balance row and should not be used.
R&D label exists but appears in supplemental section below operating profit; do not include in SG&A per placement rule.
Supplemental compensation disclosure; likely already embedded in broader operating expense buckets.
Looks like an alternate/empty label; less preferred than populated 'Personnel expenses'.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A total row is present, so selected the best overhead buckets. Excluded 'External Services' as likely direct production/service cost, and excluded subcomponents/supplemental rows to avoid double counting.

candidates.why: Explicit R&D expense label; preferred dedicated line even though it appears in supplemental section below operating profit.
Also explicit R&D label, but appears more supplemental/total in nature.
